title: ferreyranthus rugosus
intro: Ferreyranthus rugosus, also known as the rough ferreyranthus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ferreyranthus rugosus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
